conditions.critical_condition_basis: explicit mention of critical conditions for PPO separation
conditions.evidence_text: In isocratic mode... solvent composition... was changed to 65:35v/v tetrahydrofuran (THF)/ water, which represents the 'critical' ratio.
conditions.notes: Used for separation of PPO in isocratic mode. The text states this ratio represents the critical condition for PPO.
conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Dept. I 'Analytical Chemistry, Reference Materials', Richard-Willstactier-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: explicit mention of critical conditions for PEO separation
conditions.evidence_text: In isocratic mode... solvent composition... of 85:15v/v... for the separation of PPO... was changed to 65:35v/v... which represents the 'critical' ratio. In gradient mode 'critical' conditions of separation of PEO... were initially adjusted.
conditions.notes: The text implies the 85:15 THF/water ratio is the critical condition for PEO, as the gradient starts here and shifts to LAC mode. The text explicitly links the 65:35 ratio to PPO critical conditions, and the 85:15 ratio is the starting point for PEO separation before shifting.
conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Dept. I 'Analytical Chemistry, Reference Materials', Richard-Willstactier-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany
